creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 230977
Update py-confluent-kafka to 1.8.2

Update net/py-confluent-kafka to 1.8.2
Fix installing LICENSE.txt to /usr/local by patching setup.py

There is rather old issue regarding wrong path for licensefile: https://github.com/confluentinc/confluent-kafka-python/pull/713

I'll try to push this issue to fix things upstream.

Thank you for brining it to attention.
